channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sophie Cunningham Stands Firm on Women's Sports Stance, Refuses to Apologize
Saudi Nuclear Deal Raises Concerns; Lindsey Graham's Death Opened Door
item.description: The late Sen. Lindsey Graham's final wish was a U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal he quietly championed.

item.title: Far-Left 'Squad' Democrats Mistakenly Attack Jewish Colleague, Then Face Backlash Over Own Votes
item.description: Rep. Josh Gottheimer clashed with 'Squad' members after Rep. Summer Lee confused him with Pennsylvania Gov. Jo...

item.title: Hamas Attack Survivor Criticizes Mamdani's 'Dangerous' Video on Netanyahu
item.description: Mazal Tazazo said NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani's video calling Netanyahu a 'war criminal' is 'dangerous.'
